question: Which statement about night reading preference is most accurate?

options.A: Fewer than half of people in county Z prefer reading at night.
options.B: Around one‑third of people in county Z prefer reading at night.
options.C: More than half of people in county Z prefer reading at night.
options.D: Night and morning preferences are about the same.

explanation: The grey slice (Night) is 45%, which is less than half. The misleading angle encourages choosing that more than half prefer night, but the majority is actually the red Morning slice (55%).
